_comment: Recorded decryptdata request for testnet Piece 3 PNG delivery. Used as the Layer 3 'recorded demo' payload in the Phase 4 viewer. The memo DD (datadescriptor) is GENERIC — it was observed to be byte-identical across all 6 notes on the curator z-addr via z_listreceivedbyaddress (0-txid sentinel). Confirmed via piece 5 live decryptdata test in the same session (different txid, same memo DD → daemon returned piece 5 PNG bytes). This means the mainnet browser viewer can ship ONE hardcoded memo DD constant and vary only (txid, evk) per delivery.
expected_response_shape: [ { version: 1, flags: 2, objectdata: <hex PNG bytes>, salt: <32-byte hex> } ]
